title: raw_77_ribozyme_selex_v0 — synbio SELEX handoff witness
description: Synbio-side handshake schema (selection-stage). Pairs with hexa-bio raw_77_ribozyme_design_v1 (design-stage) under the joint family raw_77_ribozyme_selex_handoff_v0. Canonical boundary spec lands 2026-05-06 in life/synbio/synbio.md §3 'Handoff schema spec'. raw_91 honest C3: stub repo — no live wet-lab assays at land time; this schema reserves the row shape so that when wet-lab infrastructure exists (hexa-bio cycle 30+), rows can be emitted without further schema drift.

design_row_ref.description: Upstream hexa-bio registry row id with schema_version=raw_77_ribozyme_design_v1 (handshake link).

round_n.description: SELEX round count (0 = naive library, pre-selection).

enriched_pool_size.description: Pool size after round_n (sequences at or above detection threshold).

top_hit_kcat_KM_M_inv_s_inv.description: Wet-lab assayed catalytic efficiency for the top hit (M^-1 s^-1); bounded by Eigen-Hammes ceiling 1e9.

hit_deconvolution_witness_ref.description: External artefact ref (NGS run id, Sanger trace, or literal 'stub' if unavailable). Never silently empty (raw_91 invariant).

n6_invariant_inherited.description: Inherited from upstream design row; passes through unchanged.

raw_91_honest_c3.description: Honest C3 disclosure block. Required when row is emitted from a stub-state synbio repo (no wet-lab).

stub_state.description: True if this row was emitted without live wet-lab assays (boundary spec landed but selection infrastructure absent).

disclosure.description: Free-text disclosure (e.g. 'no wet-lab partner engaged at land time; row reserved for future cycle 30+ population').
